the values 0 and 1 will be compared. Since 0 is smaller than 1, the program will attempt to subtract the smaller number from the bigger number. Hence, the resulting value does not change, v[i] and v[j] will still be the same numbers in the next iteration, thus the same whing will happen and the loop will not terminate. This is not the case with the other example inputs, since they do not contain a 0.
